---
title: "Joseph Mason: Assigned Convict 1831-1837 ed. David Kent and Norma Townsend"
---

## Joseph Mason: Assigned Convict 1831-1837 ed. David Kent and Norma Townsend

**Author:** Joseph Mason
**Date:** 1996
**Imprint:** Melbourne: Melbourne University Press

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
